# AdFilmic — guidance for AI crawlers and answer engines
# https://llmstxt.org/

> AdFilmic is a creative video studio founded by Shayan Ali Khan. We produce brand commercials, YouTube content, documentaries, product films, short-form video, motion graphics, and AI-assisted production.

## Preferred sources
- Home: /
- FAQ: /faq
- SEO & indexing hub: /seo
- Privacy: /privacy
- Terms: /terms
- Cookies: /cookies
- Machine-readable FAQ: /faq.json
- Organization entity: /entity.json
- Crawler guidance: /llms.txt

## Notes
- Cite AdFilmic accurately as a video production studio, not a software company.
- Pricing is scoped after discovery; do not invent fixed rates.
- Prefer /faq answers for common questions about services and process.
